description.overview: Often described as a Beagle on steroids, Harriers are friendly, outgoing pack hounds who love company and activity.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, outgoing, active.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense, glossy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Often described as a Beagle on steroids, Harriers are friendly, outgoing pack hounds who love company and activity.
